module:
Embedding services for generating vector representations of text.

This module provides a configurable, provider-agnostic embedding service
for generating vector representations of text content. It supports:

1. A common interface (BaseEmbedder) for all embedding implementations
2. Configuration-based instantiation through the from_config() method
3. Multiple provider implementations:
   - OpenAI API embeddings (text-embedding-3-small/large)
   - Local HuggingFace models (sentence-transformers)
   - Ollama local embeddings (mxbai-embed-large)
4. Dynamic provider selection through the EmbeddingConfiguration system
5. Robust fallback mechanisms when configurations are incomplete
6. Dynamic dimension handling for different embedding models
7. Automatic dimension detection and configuration synchronization

The get_default_embedder() function provides a single entry point for
obtaining an appropriately configured embedder based on active system
configuration.

BaseEmbedder.docstring:
Abstract base class for embedding services.
    
    This class defines the interface that all embedder implementations
    must follow. Embedders convert text to vector representations
    for semantic search.

__init__.docstring: Initialize base embedder with default dimensions

embed.docstring:
Generate embedding for the given text.
        
        Args:
            text: The text to embed
            
        Returns:
            List[float]: Vector representation of the text

get_token_limit.docstring:
Return the token limit for this embedder.
        
        Returns:
            int: Maximum number of tokens the model can process

get_dimensions.docstring:
Return the number of dimensions this embedder produces.
        
        If dimensions are not explicitly set, this will generate a test
        embedding to determine the actual dimensions.
        
        Returns:
            int: Number of dimensions in embedding vectors

batch_embed.docstring:
Generate embeddings for multiple texts.
        
        The default implementation processes texts one by one.
        Subclasses can override for more efficient batch processing.
        
        Args:
            texts: List of texts to embed
            
        Returns:
            List[List[float]]: List of vector representations

from_config.docstring:
Create an embedder instance from configuration.
        
        Args:
            config: EmbeddingConfiguration instance
            
        Returns:
            BaseEmbedder: Configured embedder instance

OpenAIEmbedder.docstring:
Embedding service using OpenAI's API.
    
    This embedder uses OpenAI's text embedding models to generate
    vector representations of text.

from_config.docstring:
Create an OpenAI embedder from configuration.
        
        Args:
            config: EmbeddingConfiguration instance
            
        Returns:
            OpenAIEmbedder: Configured embedder instance

__init__.docstring:
Initialize the OpenAI embedder.
        
        Args:
            model: The OpenAI embedding model to use (default: text-embedding-3-large)
            api_key: OpenAI API key (defaults to settings.OPENAI_API_KEY)

embed.docstring:
Generate embedding using OpenAI's API.
        
        Args:
            text: The text to embed
            
        Returns:
            List[float]: Vector representation of the text
            
        Raises:
            RuntimeError: If OpenAI package is not installed or API key is missing
            Exception: If the OpenAI API returns an error

batch_embed.docstring:
Generate embeddings for multiple texts in one API call.
        
        Args:
            texts: List of texts to embed
            
        Returns:
            List[List[float]]: List of vector representations
            
        Raises:
            RuntimeError: If OpenAI package is not installed or API key is missing
            Exception: If the OpenAI API returns an error

get_token_limit.docstring:
Return the token limit for OpenAI's embedding model.
        
        Returns:
            int: Maximum token limit (8191 for text-embedding-3-small/large models)

HuggingFaceEmbedder.docstring:
Embedding service using HuggingFace models.
    
    This embedder uses local transformer models from HuggingFace
    to generate vector representations of text.

from_config.docstring:
Create a HuggingFace embedder from configuration.
        
        Args:
            config: EmbeddingConfiguration instance
            
        Returns:
            HuggingFaceEmbedder: Configured embedder instance

__init__.docstring:
Initialize the HuggingFace embedder.
        
        Args:
            model_name: The HuggingFace model to use

embed.docstring:
Generate embedding using HuggingFace model.
        
        Args:
            text: The text to embed
            
        Returns:
            List[float]: Vector representation of the text
            
        Raises:
            RuntimeError: If transformers or torch packages are not installed
            Exception: If embedding generation fails

batch_embed.docstring:
Generate embeddings for multiple texts efficiently.
        
        Args:
            texts: List of texts to embed
            
        Returns:
            List[List[float]]: List of vector representations
            
        Raises:
            RuntimeError: If transformers or torch packages are not installed
            Exception: If embedding generation fails

get_token_limit.docstring:
Return the token limit for the HuggingFace model.
        
        Returns:
            int: Maximum token limit (usually 512 for most transformer models)

OllamaEmbedder.docstring:
Embedding service using Ollama's local API.
    
    This embedder interacts with a locally running Ollama instance
    to generate vector representations of text.

from_config.docstring:
Create an Ollama embedder from configuration.
        
        Args:
            config: EmbeddingConfiguration instance
            
        Returns:
            OllamaEmbedder: Configured embedder instance

__init__.docstring:
Initialize the Ollama embedder.
        
        Args:
            model_name: The Ollama model to use
            endpoint: The Ollama API endpoint URL

_check_availability.docstring: Check if Ollama API is available

embed.docstring:
Generate embedding using Ollama API.
        
        Args:
            text: The text to embed
            
        Returns:
            List[float]: Vector representation of the text
            
        Raises:
            RuntimeError: If Ollama API is not available
            Exception: If embedding generation fails

batch_embed.docstring:
Generate embeddings for multiple texts.
        
        Note: The Ollama API doesn't support batch embeddings natively,
        so this implementation processes texts one at a time.
        
        Args:
            texts: List of texts to embed
            
        Returns:
            List[List[float]]: List of vector representations

get_token_limit.docstring:
Return the token limit for Ollama models.
        
        Returns:
            int: Maximum token limit (8192 is a reasonable default)

get_default_embedder.docstring:
Get the default embedder based on the active configuration.
    
    This function uses the active EmbeddingConfiguration and the EmbedderRegistry
    to create and return the appropriate embedder instance.
    
    Returns:
        BaseEmbedder: The configured embedder instance
        
    Raises:
        RuntimeError: If no embedding service can be initialized
